name: cloud build: a freshly scaffolded unit is red because conformance is not yet satisfied
command:
cat > adr.json <<'JEOF'
{"decision_id":"0007-zt","title":"Zero Trust mesh","pillar":"security"}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh" scaffold --from-adr adr.json --tool terraform --build-dir build --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh" check --build-dir build --unit 0007-zt
